name: Study 5: Recurrent MACE Incidence by Sex — Clopidogrel Arm
description: Sex-stratified MACE recurrence rates in post-MI clopidogrel initiators.

design_json.description: Sex-stratified recurrent MACE incidence rates in post-MI clopidogrel initiators. Sex differences in antiplatelet efficacy and platelet reactivity are documented — this analysis estimates whether the protective effect varies by sex.
